overall.description: A third-person perspective video game scene showing a character in white robes with a sword ascending snowy mountain stairs at night. The character traverses from an enclosed stone stairway onto open snow-covered mountain paths under a starry sky, eventually approaching a large ornate door in a stone tower.

tall dark stone wall forming the right boundary of the passage

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a narrow, enclosed stone staircase flanked by high fortress walls. The lighting is dim with only starlight visible from above. At the end of the segment, the character emerges from the stairway onto an open snowy mountainside.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow-covered mountain path along stone fortress wall

events.description: turns toward stone tower and approaches the entrance staircase

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snowy mountain path beside a massive stone tower wall

entered.detail: snow-covered mountain trail with visible footprints and rocky edges
massive curved stone wall of a fortress tower rising on the right side
snow-covered mountain peaks visible in the distance under starlight
clear night sky filled with stars and faint purple nebula clouds

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide-open snow-covered mountain path under a clear starry night sky. A massive stone tower wall runs along the right side while snow-covered mountain peaks stretch into the distance on the left. The character maintains a steady pace along the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep stone staircase leading to ornate fortress door

events.description: reaches the top of the stairs and approaches the large ornate metal door

agents.ego_description: climbing the steep stone stairs toward the large ornate door of the tower

entered.detail: steep stone stairs leading up to the tower entrance with snow-dusted steps
large circular bronze door with intricate carvings and a central ring design
stone wall forming the left side of the tower entrance staircase

segments.scene_description: The character turns toward the stone tower and ascends a steep staircase flanked by high stone walls. The large ornate metal door with intricate circular designs becomes progressively more prominent as the character climbs. The starry sky remains visible above the tower walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character ascends from a confined stone fortress into the vastness of a snowy mountain peak before approaching a monumental tower entrance. It begins within a narrow, enclosed stone staircase where dim starlight filters down from above, moving steadily upward until the character emerges from the enclosure onto an open, snow-covered mountainside. As the environment expands, the camera tracks the character along a wide mountain path flanked by a massive stone wall on one side and distant, jagged peaks under a clear starry sky on the other. The scene then shifts as the character turns toward the tower, ascending a final steep staircase between high walls that gradually frame a large, ornate metal door with intricate circular designs.
